description_long: This motorcycle features a classic cafe racer design with a streamlined front fairing, dual round headlights, and a prominent windscreen. The body is painted in a striking combination of British racing green, white, and gold accents, with a brown leather seat and a Union Jack motif on the rear cowl. The frame and wheels are metallic, with visible suspension components and a robust engine block. The tires are thick and treaded, suitable for urban and road environments. Chrome and metallic finishes are evident on the exhaust, handlebars, and other trim elements, giving it a premium, vintage-inspired appearance. The overall build suggests a blend of retro styling and modern engineering.
description: A vintage-inspired cafe racer motorcycle with green, white, and gold accents, brown leather seat, and Union Jack rear cowl. Features dual headlights, metallic frame, and premium finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing dual round headlights, windscreen, and the narrow profile of the front tire.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full body, brown seat, engine, and Union Jack rear cowl.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide rear tire, tail section, and part of the seat and cowl.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the engine, exhaust, and detailed frame with the Union Jack motif.
